3021830.name: Access: EnTree
3021830.description:
Access: EnTree is the first-ever game to promote awareness of accessibility and disabilities. The player collaborates with their community to create an accommodating village and recruit new characters into their community. Players learn about accessibility issues through a relaxing social sim environment.

Embark on quests as you explore the world of Axis and make the land of EnTree more accessible!

Farm resources and utilize them for builds, crafts, recipes and more!

Craft and furnish the town to your hearts content!
